// <auto-generated />
// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: Array
#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

internal static class FastData
{



    private static readonly float[] _keys = new float[] {
        1.25f, 3.5f, 6.75f, 9f
    };

    
    public static bool Contains(float key)
    {
        if ((key < 1.25f))
        {
         return false;
        }

        if ((key > 9f))
        {
         return false;
        }



        for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++)
        {
            if (key == _keys[i])
                return true;
        }
        return false;
    }

    public const int ItemCount = 4;
    public const float MinKey = 1.25f;
    public const float MaxKey = 9f;
}
